overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through rural farmland. The character passes thatched-roof farmhouses and crop fields under a partly cloudy sky, with the camera smoothly following from behind at a consistent elevated angle.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the farmhouse, observing the surrounding crop fields

entered.detail: traditional wooden farmhouse with straw roof and timber frame walls
cultivated agricultural fields with rows of green crops
unpaved walking trail winding through farmland
simple wooden post and rail fencing
tall evergreen trees forming a distant forest line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dirt path through open farmland. A traditional thatched farmhouse sits ahead while cultivated crop fields line the left side of the path. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character approaches the farmhouse, passing wooden fences on the right.

events.description: damaged farmhouse with collapsed roof sections becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through open grassland, approaching the damaged structure visible ahead

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden structure with partially collapsed thatched roof
open meadow with tall wild grass
scattered buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the first farmhouse, the scene opens into broader grassland with scattered trees. The damaged farmhouse becomes visible ahead as the character continues along the trail. The crop fields give way to wild meadows while distant structures appear on the horizon.

events.description: path curves slightly left at the junction with another dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking past the ruined farmhouse and navigating the trail junction as the path enters a more wooded area toward the distant village

entered.detail: intersection where multiple dirt paths converge
cluster of wooden structures marking a small settlement
tall stone structure visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character passes the damaged farmhouse on the left and continues into a more densely vegetated area. The path approaches a junction where multiple trails meet, with a village visible in the distance. Tree cover increases, creating dappled shade on the trail as the camera follows the slight left curve of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through rural farmland that gradually transitions from cultivated fields into open, wild grasslands. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path, passing wooden fences and cultivated crop fields as he approaches a traditional thatched farmhouse. As the character moves past the first building, the structured farmland gives way to broader meadows and scattered trees. The scene then opens further to reveal a damaged farmhouse ahead while distant structures emerge on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a damaged rural homestead into a more secluded, wooded approach to a distant village. It begins as the character passes a dilapidated farmhouse on the left, moving forward as the open farmland gives way to denser vegetation. As the camera follows a slight left curve in the path, the surrounding tree cover increases, casting dappled shade across the dirt trail. The scene then opens toward a junction where multiple trails meet, finally revealing the silhouette of a village in the distance.
